titleStmt.title: SII 26.452: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 452. (A.R. No. 429 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the Vāhana-maṇḍapa in the same temple.

This inscription records the grant, as tax-free dēvadāna, of a number of taxes such as taṟi-iṟai, śēttiṟai, etc., levied by the nāṭṭārs from the residents of the tirumaḍai-viḷāgam of the temple of Tiruppulippagavanāyaṉār of Śiṟṟiṅgūr a brahmadēśam, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Irājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, made by the king to provide for a service, named after the king, to the god, instituted by a certain Kūttapperumāḷ, an aṅgavaidya and for a festival of the same deity. It is stated that this royal order was addressed to the tāṉattār (trustees) of the temple. A certain Tuñjalūruḍaiyāṉ and Pallavarāyar figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmateśam ciṟṟiṅkūruṭaiyār
tiruppulippulippakavanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉārkku nam perāl Aṅkavayidyarilk kūttapperumāḷ kaṭṭiṉa cantikkum tirunāḷukku Uṭalāka Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Irukku
m kuṭimakkaḷ pakkal nāṭṭār koṇṭu potum taṟi Iṟai ceṭṭiṟai Ācu potumakkaḷaporkkaṭamai vaṭa kkal Erimiṉpāṭṭam cekku Āyam taraku vācalappaṇam maṉaivari
paṭṭitteṇṭam kuṟṟateṇṭam Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Aḷappaṉa mukappaṉa niṟuppaṉa ppaṉavu mutalc carakku Aṅkāṭippāṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa patiṉoṉṟāvatu puraṭṭāti mātamutal vari
yilk kaḻittu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu veṇṭum kuṭikaḷum Eṟṟat tirumaṭaiviḷākam nāṉkel
laiyilum tiruccūlastāpanam paṇṇikkoḷka tulalam tuñcalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pallavarāyar Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.452 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
